title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners:
IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners!
